basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Consultant - Internal Audit Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website of Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Consultant - Internal Audit Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University/Institution, 10 years of work experience on GoI Rules to handle Personnel, Finance matters, Inventory Management, Purchase of Goods & Services etc., Only Retired Government Employees
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University/Institution. 10 years of work experience on GoI Rules to handle Personnel, Finance matters, Inventory Management, Purchase of Goods & Services etc. Only Retired Government Employees are allowed to apply. Desirable: The candidate should have experience of at least in the rank equivalent to Pay level 10 and above.

salary_details.details: As per Government rules (Last drawn Basic Pay less Pension)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Consultant – Internal Audit recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Consultant – Internal Audit position is 15th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University or Institution to be eligible for the Consultant – Internal Audit role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, applicants need to have 10 years of work experience on GoI Rules, specifically in handling Personnel, Finance matters, Inventory Management, and Purchase of Goods & Services.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Only retired Government Employees who meet the specified educational and experience criteria are eligible to apply for this Consultant – Internal Audit position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Consultant – Internal Audit post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant – Internal Audit position is 65 years. There is no minimum age specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Consultant – Internal Audit role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of applications followed by a personal interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 125/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Consultant – Internal Audit position is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Therefore, this recruitment is for candidates in Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to review the notification before applying.
